title: Budding Amethyst Recipe
description: Now craft your own budding amethyst
body:
🔮 Budding Amethyst Recipe Datapack  
Grow geodes your way—no RNG mining required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for Budding Amethyst, letting players craft their own geode cores using harvested clusters and blocks.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 4 Amethyst Clusters + 1 Amethyst Block → yields 1 Budding Amethyst  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with geode growth mechanics and late-game automation   
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.17+
